what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment in the design-assets channel, pointing to the icon asset at image://design-assets/icons/Users2.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target uses an image:// URI: image://design-assets/icons/Users2.
standouts: The target is a URI-schemed image reference (image://design-assets/icons/Users2).
It belongs to the design-assets channel.
It is a typed attachment record with no additional descriptive fields.
conventions: Follows an att- prefixed identifier pattern.
Records a channel, attachment_type, target URI, and timestamp.
notes: A minimal design-assets channel attachment record that registers the Users2 icon image via a URI target.
questions: What does the Users2 icon look like and what is its intended use?
What file format and resolution does image://design-assets/icons/Users2 resolve to?
Who added this attachment and why was it created?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be an attachment ledger record for an image asset, and that is exactly what its metadata describes.
intention_signals: It seems to be registering the Users2 icon as a discoverable image attachment under the design-assets channel.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI scheme to target a design asset rather than a conventional file path.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed association between the design-assets channel and the Users2 icon asset, supporting asset lookup and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that registers an image asset named Users2 at image://design-assets/icons/Users2 in the design-assets channel, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog the Users2 icon image as an attachment in the design-assets channel.
